title: Docker git for platform-spec git-meta and docs-ui CSS sync

source.subject: chore(docker): update Dockerfile to include git for platform-spec generation

body:
## What shipped

Website production Docker image installs **git** so platform-spec git-meta prebuild (`generate-platform-spec-git-meta.mjs`) succeeds in container builds.

## Source commit

Repository **`beskid`** · commit `b219677`

> chore(docker): update Dockerfile to include git for platform-spec generation

## Completed

2026-05-24 (catalog cutoff window).
